title: Ck7 Ultra
description: Ck7 Ultra - Best optimized Minecraft pack
body:
![Banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c680b0aeacb6c6351443affaa870b7913714453.png)
CK7 Ultra isn’t just another performance modpack, it’s the result of years of real testing, tweaking, and hands-on experience optimizing Minecraft.
It was created with one goal in mind: deliver higher FPS, smoother gameplay, and rock-solid stability, even on low-end PCs.

Unlike other modpacks that simply throw in every “performance mod” available, which actually reduces performance due to conflicts, duplication, and unnecessary load — CK7 Ultra follows a completely different philosophy: quality over quantity.

We tested every possible combination of the best optimization mods out there: different versions, configs, compatibility layers, and performance scenarios. Mod by mod, setting by setting, we benchmarked them in real gameplay conditions to find the perfect balance between speed, smoothness, and stability.

The result is a lightweight, powerful, and truly effective modpack, built only with the mods that proved to deliver:

The highest real FPS gains

Minimal CPU and RAM usage

Full compatibility with each other

Long-term stability in heavy or long-running worlds

We selected only the top-performing mods because adding everything “just because” does the opposite of optimization — it destroys performance.

With CK7 Ultra, you don’t need to search, test, or waste hours trying out dozens of mods that promise miracles but don’t deliver. We already did all the experimenting for you.

Just install, play, and enjoy a Minecraft experience that’s faster, smoother, and more stable than ever before.
More FPS. Less lag. Maximum efficiency with the best possible number of mods.
